description: When the daemon's merge gate detects a conflict on a task branch, instead of blocking the task, launch an LLM agent to resolve the conflict. The agent should: (1) run git merge and capture conflict markers, (2) read both sides of each conflict, (3) understand the intent from the task description and branch changes, (4) resolve conflicts, (5) run cargo check/test to verify, (6) commit the merge resolution and continue the workflow. This should be a new phase or a recovery step in the merge gate logic in daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs.
title: Auto-resolve merge conflicts using LLM agent in daemon workflow
